metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Gowtham — carry-forward for session memory, video-insight for deep video understanding, deep-engineer for disciplined engineering loops.

plugins.name: carry-forward
plugins.description: Persists Claude Code session context across sessions. Auto-saves after every response via Stop hook. Auto-loads at session start via CLAUDE.md @import.

plugins.name: video-insight
plugins.description: Give Claude deep understanding of any video. Extracts keyframes, OCR text, colors, motion events, cursor path, fonts, loading states, and confidence scores. 17 skills for frontend code, design specs, tests, PRDs, and more.

plugins.name: deep-engineer
plugins.description: Forces Claude through a disciplined engineering loop: generalize the problem, think through scenarios, TDD, implement, verify. Prevents hardcoded solutions and skipped edge cases.
